data.phrase:
dataset = findings 
// | filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code"
| filter xdm.finding.owner  = "CAS"
| alter detection_method = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["detection_method"]
| alter repo_name = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.repository.name"]
| alter repo_project = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.repository.name"]
| alter repo_branch = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.code.git.branch"]
| alter provider = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.code.git.provider"]
| alter org = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.repository.organization"]
| filter detection_method IN ($detection_method)
| filter repo_name IN ($repo_name)
| filter provider IN ($provider)
| filter org IN ($org)
| filter xdm.finding.asset_category  IN ($category)
| filter xdm.finding.asset_type IN ($type)
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_LICENSE_SCANNER"
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_OPERATIONAL_RISK_SCANNER"
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_CI_CD_RISK_SCANNER"
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_IAC_SCANNER"
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_SECRET_SCANNER"
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_SAST_SCANNER"
// | filter detection_method != "CAS_CVE_SCANNER"
// | filter provider = ""
// | filter org = ""
// | filter repo_name = ""

// | alter domain = xdm.finding.extended_fields  -> ["issue_data"]["domain"]
// | alter asset_provider = xdm.finding.extended_fields  -> ["xdm__asset_provider"]

| alter file_name = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.file.path"]
| alter package_manager = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.software_package.package_manager"]
| alter language = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.software_package.language"]
| alter dependency = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.software_package.dependency_type"]
// | alter severity = xdm.finding.normalized_fields  -> ["xdm.vulnerability.severity"]
| alter severity = xdm.finding.extended_fields  -> ["issue_data"]["severity"]
| filter severity IN ($severity)
| alter cve = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.vulnerability.cve_id"]
| alter exploitable = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["is_kev"]
// | filter exploitable  IN ($exploitable)
| alter cve_vendor_link = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.vulnerability.cve_vendor_link"]
| alter package_version = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["package_version"]
// | alter fix = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["is_fixable"]
| alter fix_versions = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.vulnerability.fix_versions"]
| alter cvss_score = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.vulnerability.cvss_score"]
| alter epss_score = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.vulnerability.epss_score"]
| alter fix_versions     = json_extract_scalar_array(xdm.finding.normalized_fields, "$.\"xdm.vulnerability.fix_versions\"")
| alter cve_risk_factors = json_extract_scalar_array(xdm.finding.normalized_fields, "$.\"xdm.vulnerability.cve_risk_factors\"")
| alter cve_fix_date = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.vulnerability.fix_date"]
| alter impact = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.impact"]
| alter remediation = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["issue_data"]["remediation"]
| alter action = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["issue_data_extended"]["action"]
| alter remediation = if(remediation = null or remediation = "", action, remediation)
| alter collaborator = xdm.finding.normalized_fields  -> ["xdm.code.git.commit.author.name"]
| filter collaborator IN ($collaborator)

| alter rule_id = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["rule_id"]
| alter repository_id = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["repository_id"]
| alter prioritization_labels = xdm.finding.extended_fields  -> ["prioritization_labels"]
| alter license = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.license.name"]
| alter report_data_source = xdm.finding.extended_fields  -> ["report_data_source"]
// | alter scan_type = xdm.finding.normalized_fields  -> ["scan_type"]
| alter scan_type = xdm.finding.normalized_fields  -> ["xdm.code.scan_source"]
| alter documentation_link = xdm.finding.extended_fields  -> ["documentation_link"]
| alter last_commit = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.code.git.commit.time"]
| alter last_commit = format_timestamp("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ", to_timestamp(to_integer(last_commit), "MILLIS"))
| alter code_lines = concat(
    to_string(xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.file.position.start.line"]),
    ",",
    to_string(xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.file.position.end.line"])
)
// | fields severity, xdm.finding.owner as owner, detection_method, xdm.finding.asset_class  as class, xdm.finding.asset_category as category,  xdm.finding.asset_type as type,  scan_type, provider, org, repo_name, repo_branch, xdm.finding.asset_name as finding_asset_name, collaborator, file_name,  code_lines , xdm.finding.name as finding_name, xdm.finding.description as finding_description,  impact, remediation , rule_id, language, package_manager, dependency,  package_version,  fix_versions, cve, cve_fix_date , exploitable ,cvss_score, epss_score , cve_risk_factors , license, report_data_source, prioritization_labels , documentation_link, cve_vendor_link, last_commit, xdm.finding.last_observed  as last_observed, repository_id
| fields severity, xdm.finding.owner as owner, detection_method, xdm.finding.asset_class  as class, xdm.finding.asset_category as category,  xdm.finding.asset_type as type,  scan_type, provider, org, repo_name, repo_branch, xdm.finding.asset_name as finding_asset_name, collaborator, file_name,  code_lines , xdm.finding.name as finding_name, xdm.finding.description as finding_description,  impact, remediation , rule_id, language, package_manager, dependency,  package_version,  fix_versions, cve, cve_fix_date , exploitable ,cvss_score, epss_score , cve_risk_factors , license, report_data_source, prioritization_labels , documentation_link, cve_vendor_link, last_commit, xdm.finding.last_observed  as last_observed, repository_id, xdm.finding.normalized_fields , xdm.finding.extended_fields
| sort asc org, asc repo_name, asc detection_method

| filter (provider contains """azure""")

input_dict.xql:
dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code"
| alter detection_method = xdm.finding.extended_fields -> ["detection_method"]
| fields detection_method
| dedup detection_method
| sort asc detection_method

dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code"
| fields xdm.finding.asset_category  
| dedup xdm.finding.asset_category  
| sort asc xdm.finding.asset_category

dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code"
| fields xdm.finding.asset_type 
| dedup xdm.finding.asset_type  
| sort asc xdm.finding.asset_type

dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code"
| alter provider = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.code.git.provider"]
| fields provider
| dedup provider
| sort asc provider

dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code"
| alter org = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.repository.organization"]
| fields org
| dedup org
| sort asc org

dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code" 
| alter repo_name = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.repository.name"]
| fields repo_name
| dedup repo_name
| sort asc repo_name

dataset = findings 
| filter xdm.finding.asset_class = "code" 
| alter collaborator = xdm.finding.normalized_fields -> ["xdm.code.git.commit.author.name"]
| fields collaborator
| dedup collaborator
| sort asc collaborator
